channel.title: Messaging on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Messaging on Arrans github.io

item.title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
item.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

item.title: tinode/chat
item.description: Instant messaging platform. Backend in Go. Clients: Swift iOS, Java Android, JS webapp, scriptable command line; chatbots

item.title: poundifdef/smoothmq
item.description: An improved drop-in replacement for SQS

item.title: oOthkOo/whatsapp-desktop
item.description: Unofficial WhatsApp Desktop Client for OSX, Linux and Windows. Build with Electron.

item.title: processone/ejabberd
item.description: Robust, Ubiquitous and Massively Scalable Messaging Platform (XMPP, MQTT, SIP Server)

item.title: sandglass/sandglass
item.description: Sandglass is a distributed, horizontally scalable, persistent, time sorted message queue.
